text.title: Strategy Analysis — Change Strategy — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: define-transitions
step.action: Per option: transition states + dependencies + duration.

step.name: assess-readiness
step.action: Per option: skills + capacity + culture + infra gap.

step.name: recommend
step.action: Recommend with rationale; route to decision-maker with deadline.
